item.title: Solid advice
item.description: FP Edit: I don't really know the etiquette for FP Edits, but I'd like to make anyone that doesn't know aware of @TheFreePizzaDude They assist fellow imgurians in need with meals. They kindly gifted me a pizza last night that will feed me through the weekend. I believe they take donations!

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i'm an easy shag
i'm using this as me and fellow dumpers
why can't it just fly where it needs to go?
someone please live in this salad with me
ranch... bbq
i love stoner chicks
sorry about this one
are you ok, wisconsin?
mmm hmm
there goes my week
that's Robert California and U.S Marshal Vince Larkin
finally
they def look like nerds
i guess
i know ramen?
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

maybe?

Wait until they find out what Hitachi makes, yes they make "back massagers", but they also make trains.

oh no

Ubuntu after installing me: Wow, this is terrible.
That dog? That dog is the Dog of Wisdom.
:3
Guess we know where Epstein got his money from.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Boys should babysit more
item.description: I'm a dad of a 16yo boy who's school so far has been a bit of a strugle. Today he was babysitting for the first time and he sent me this picture. I couldn't be more proud. I don't care if he likes school or not. He is pure gold.

item.title: Cat’s escape attempt thwarted

item.title: Neat movie cameos you might not have known about, Part 1
item.description:
Remember this scientist, who had like 2 lines in IRON MAN (and showed up 11 years later in SPIDER-MAN: FAR FROM HOME)? Before that…
He was MING MING the toy foreman in ELF. And before that…
He was Ralphie Parker in A CHRISTMAS STORY. His name’s Peter Billingsley, and he’s been in showbiz a long time, with a few directing credits and lots of TV producing under his belt.
This poor idiot pirate in Steven Spielberg’s HOOK, who got sent to the Boo Box? You’re not gonna believe this…
It was Glenn Close! She was visiting the set and they asked her if she wanted to be a pirate. She was ecstatic to jump in.
Finally, the Father Christmas that stabs Sergeant Angel in HOT FUZZ?
Acclaimed director of THE LORD OF THE RINGS trilogy Peter Jackson. Who could say no to Simon Pegg and Edgar Wright? Hope you enjoyed this and maybe learned something neat. I’ll do a part 2 and beyond if there’s interest.
item.dc:creator: rabbihimself

item.title: I feel embarrassed it took so long, delighted with my bfs support, but hope it's ok to accept it at my age!
item.description: I'm 42, as a teenager I was sexually with a couple of girls, but a bad experience (oral) made me think that girl parts weren't for me. I've always been attracted to men, and always thought all girls fancied other girls.... However I've realised that actually I still find girls sexually attractive...in a way that straight girls wouldn't think I told my bf, I was very awkward, so it went like this Me: "how would you feel if I was bisexual? Would you care?" Him "Well no, are you?" Me" Yeah, you know i was with girls before, I thought I wasn't because I could only imagine a guy as a boyfriend and that bad experience" Him: "Ok cool, so what made you realise" Me: "A dream and realising girls are hot and that not every straight girl has those fantasies" (something that's been happening for a long time) Him: "HOT, Are you going to cheat though?" Me " Of course not, It's just something I think you should know" Him " Ok cool, when you want to tell me that fantasy I'll listen" With a cheeky grin, but also a tone that was to relax the situation and make me feel at ease! Only saying it here because it feels like a milestone but not one I'm ready to share with anyone else I know irl, but I do want to share the relief!! I think here is a safe space and I have so many emotions I just want to shout into the void!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2
